home.heroTitle: Growing the Future of Agriculture with Innovation
home.heroDesc: Empowering farmers with smart technology, sustainable practices, and premium resources for a better tomorrow.
home.t1: "Prinstan Agri Care completely transformed our yield this season. Their smart agriculture solutions are simply unmatched in the market."

about.title: About Prinstan Agri Care
about.subtitle: Pioneering the future of agriculture through innovation and sustainability.
about.story1: Founded in 2017, Prinstan Agri Care started with a simple belief: that technology and nature can work in harmony. What began as a small regional supplier has grown into a global leader in agricultural innovation.
about.story2: We've dedicated ourselves to developing solutions that not only increase crop yields but do so while preserving our planet's precious resources. Our journey is driven by the passion of the farmers we serve.
about.visionDesc: To create a world where agriculture sustains and enriches life globally, utilizing cutting-edge technology to eliminate food scarcity while protecting the environment.
about.missionDesc: To empower farmers with innovative, sustainable, and highly effective agricultural solutions that maximize productivity and ensure long-term ecological balance.

values.v1Desc: Committed to green and eco-friendly farming practices.
values.v2Desc: Empowering farmers across borders with local solutions.
values.v3Desc: Building trust through transparency and reliable results.

about.leadershipSub: The brilliant minds driving Prinstan Agri Care's mission forward.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Premium agricultural supplies and equipment for modern farming.
products.tryAdjusting: Try adjusting your search or category filter.

items.p2Desc: 100% organic fertilizer for robust plant growth.
items.p3Desc: Protects crops without harming the environment.
items.p4Desc: Reliable and powerful for all field tasks.
items.p6Desc: Premium wheat seeds for optimal harvest.
items.p7Desc: Fast-acting liquid fertilizer for quick nutrient absorption.

projects.title: Successful Projects
projects.subtitle: Transforming agriculture worldwide through innovation, technology, and sustainable practices.

items.pr1Desc: Implemented a fully automated AI-driven drip irrigation system across 500 acres of farmland, reducing water consumption by 40% while increasing yield.
items.pr2Desc: Revitalized nutrient-depleted soil using our premium organic fertilizers and advanced crop rotation techniques, resulting in a record-breaking harvest.
items.pr3Desc: Deployed a fleet of agricultural drones for real-time crop health monitoring and targeted pesticide application, significantly reducing chemical usage.
items.pr4Desc: Designed and constructed a state-of-the-art, 100% solar-powered greenhouse facility for year-round organic vegetable production.

projects.join: Join hundreds of successful farmers who have revolutionized their yield with Prinstan Agri Care.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We're here to help you grow. Reach out to our team of agricultural experts today.

footer.desc: Growing the future of agriculture with innovative solutions, sustainable practices, and cutting-edge technology for farmers worldwide.

chatbot.welcome: Hi! I am the Prinstan Agri Care assistant. How can I help you today? You can ask me about our company, products, or projects.
chatbot.fallback: I'm sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Try asking about our 'company', 'products', or 'projects'.
chatbot.replyGreetings: Hello there! How can I assist you with Prinstan Agri Care today?
chatbot.replyCompany: Prinstan Agri Care was founded in 1998. We are a global leader in agricultural innovation, focusing on sustainability and high-yield technology.
chatbot.replyProducts: We offer a wide range of premium products including organic fertilizers, high-yield seeds, smart irrigation systems, and heavy-duty farming equipment. Check out our Products page!
chatbot.replyProjects: We have successfully completed over 150 projects globally, including smart irrigation in Maharashtra and eco-farm drone monitoring in Gujarat. View our Projects page for more info.
